title: Pin beskid_vscode submodule to canonical GitHub URL

source.subject: fix(git): pin beskid_vscode submodule to canonical GitHub URL

body:
## Outcome

Pin beskid_vscode submodule to canonical GitHub URL.

## Context

- Workstream **dev-experience** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`a12e285`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/a12e285) — fix(git): pin beskid_vscode submodule to canonical GitHub URL
